theme_strategy: Light Mode Preferred (Swiss & High-Contrast Archetype) - optimizes for dense financial data legibility and authority.

headings.strategy: Used for all H1-H4. High authority, crisp and clean. Do NOT use Inter.

body.strategy: Highly legible for dense tables, numbers, and lists.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders Strategy: Flat solid surfaces, 1px subtle borders (border-border), no ambient shadows. Do NOT use glassmorphism on data-heavy areas.
visual_enhancers.shapes: Very subtle roundness. max 4px (rounded-sm) to keep a sharp, financial aesthetic.
visual_enhancers.textures: Minimal. High contrast between text and background. No 'AI slop' gradients.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense dashboard layouts.

component_name_mapping.toast: Sonner (from shadcn/ui) - ensure `<Toaster />` is included at the root level.
component_name_mapping.charts: recharts or shadcn/ui chart component for analytics

grids.dashboard_home: High Density Grid (Bento Mode B). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. gap-6.

layouts.general: Sidebar Navigation + Top Header + Main Content Area.
layouts.spacing: Generous internal padding for containers (p-6 or p-8) despite the dense grid.
layouts.alignment: Left-align dense content and numbers (or right-align numbers in tables for decimal alignment). Never center-align paragraphs or tables.

motion.interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements (darken background, lift -translate-y-1).
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (transition-transform duration-200 ease-out). NO 'transition-all'.
motion.loading: Skeleton loaders (from shadcn) instead of generic spinners.

accessibility.contrast: Strict WCAG AA minimum. Minimum 4.5:1 for text.
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2) for form elements.
accessibility.aria: Use proper aria-labels for icon-only buttons.

media.handling: Images should not dominate the screen. Avatars and cover images should blend with the layout using strict aspect ratios.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Not required. Use high-quality 2D charts (Recharts) for analytics. Do not overcomplicate with 3D in a financial cash flow app.

image_urls.description: Minimalist geometric architectural lines to convey stability, trust, and structure for the auth screen.
Professional business avatar for user placeholder.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects carefully, but NEVER use completely transparent backgrounds under overlays, dropdowns, or sticky headers.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons. Use Phosphor Icons instead.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
CRITICAL: The codebase uses .js and .jsx, NOT .tsx. All generated React code must be standard JSX/JS.
CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (kebab-case, role-based) to facilitate robust automated testing.
CRITICAL: Shadcn components must have opinionated rules adjusted. (e.g. override tablist fixed height class `h-9` with `h-auto`).
Toasts: Use `sonner` for toasts. Component is located in `/app/frontend/src/components/ui/sonner.jsx`
